disambiguation.identity: Odoo Semantic (the odoo-semantic-mcp server) is the INDEXED Odoo source-code knowledge graph: a pre-built graph + vector index of Odoo source across every indexed Odoo version (legacy through latest) and repos/editions, with inheritance, override, and cross-module impact already resolved. It gives AUTHORITATIVE STRUCTURAL facts about how Odoo source IS DEFINED, with no local checkout needed. Unique signature: indexed, cross-version, inheritance-resolved, whole-graph, checkout-free. It is a STATIC index with NO runtime/live data.
disambiguation.precedence: This is your PRIMARY, context-efficient source for Odoo source/structure questions - the Odoo codebase is huge and reading it directly burns context, so prefer Odoo Semantic first. Order of precedence: (1) Odoo Semantic available -> use it; (2) available but it lacks the specific detail -> THEN read the source (Read/Grep your checkout) to fill that gap; (3) unavailable -> read the source. Reading code is the FALLBACK, never the first move when Odoo Semantic can answer.
not_for: LIVE DATA / runtime - actual record values, search/read/write real records, executing a method, this instance's installed modules -> use a live Odoo MCP server (one exposing read_record/search_records/execute_method), NOT Odoo Semantic.
disambiguation.overlap_note: These tool names look like they query a live instance but return indexed source data only. If you need live records, Odoo Semantic is the wrong server.

tools.name: model_inspect
tools.description: Superset inspection of an ORM model: enumerate or fully describe fields, methods, views, extenders, or a summary in one call. method ∈ {summary, fields, methods, views, extenders}. method='extenders' paginates the full 'Extended by' module list (start_index cursor). Field/method/view enumerations are page-capped server-side (50/20/10) and the summary '…and N more' shares the extenders' NOT-is_definition predicate (count parity). Supersedes removed resolve_model, list_fields, list_methods, list_views (v0.6).

tools.name: module_inspect
tools.description: Module-level architecture overview: manifest summary, models defined/extended, views, OWL components, QWeb templates, JS patches, module dependency chain, or test class list in one call. method ∈ {summary, views, owl, qweb, js, dependencies, tests}. Supersedes removed list_views (module-scoped), list_owl_components, list_qweb_templates, list_js_patches (v0.6). method='dependencies' added v0.10.0. method='tests' returns TestClass nodes in the module (ADR-0051, v0.15.0). method='summary' shares describe_module's output and may include a 'License notice:' line for license-restricted modules (server v0.9.1+) - surface it to the user; do not retry or fabricate omitted content.

tools.name: entity_lookup
tools.description: Single-entity drill-down by ID: field, method, or view with full inheritance chain and source module. Supersedes removed resolve_field, resolve_method, resolve_view (v0.6).

tools.name: profile_inspect
tools.description: Profile-level introspection discriminator (ADR-0028): inspect a tenant profile's composition in one call. method ∈ {summary, repos, modules}. summary = ancestor/inheritance chain + direct children + deduped repos (own/inherited, indexed status) + inheritance-inclusive module count (requires name=). repos = distinct repos across the full ancestor chain, deduped on (url, branch). modules = paginated module list scoped to the profile (server-enforced cap 50, start_index cursor), optional repo= URL-substring filter. name omitted on repos/modules spans all caller-visible profiles. Drill into a specific model via model_inspect, a specific module via module_inspect. RBAC: ADR-0034 tenant choke denies non-visible profiles.

tools.name: find_examples
tools.description: Semantic code search returning real indexed code snippets from the Odoo codebase. When the embedder is unavailable the server degrades to an entity-name lexical (ILIKE) fallback labeled match='lexical' instead of failing; treat lexical hits as approximate.
routing_keywords: how is X used in codebase

tools.name: impact_analysis
tools.description: Risk assessment of changing or removing a field, method, or model: blast radius, dependent modules, and downstream fields.

tools.name: lookup_core_api
tools.description: Verify Odoo core API symbol signature, status (stable/deprecated/removed), and replacement.

tools.name: api_version_diff
tools.description: Structured diff of an API symbol or scope across two Odoo versions: new, changed, removed, deprecated items.

tools.name: find_deprecated_usage
tools.description: Scan the indexed codebase for usages of deprecated API patterns.

tools.name: lint_check
tools.description: Validate code against Odoo-specific lint rules (Python/JavaScript), or return corpus-level XML RelaxNG violation nodes (language='xml', server v0.9.1+). Inline # noqa: RULE_ID suppresses findings on that line.

tools.name: cli_help
tools.description: Look up odoo-bin subcommand flags, their status, and replacement for deprecated flags.

tools.name: suggest_pattern
tools.description: Find curated Odoo design patterns from the catalogue with gotchas and anti-patterns. Optional category post-filters results by pattern_id prefix (e.g. category='test' returns test-writing patterns added in v0.15.0).

tools.name: check_module_exists
tools.description: Verify module availability, edition (CE/EE/Viindoo), and cross-version presence.
routing_keywords: is module in CE or EE
check if feature is in standard Odoo

tools.name: find_override_point
tools.description: Show override chain, super() safety guidance, and anti-patterns for a method to find the safest place to inject custom behavior.

tools.name: describe_module
tools.description: Module manifest + defined/extended model counts + view/JS inventory in one call. Note: module_inspect with method='summary' returns the same data plus extras. Output may include a 'License notice:' line for license-restricted modules (server v0.9.1+). OEEL-1 modules are skipped by default - the notice is the intentional non-silent marker that content is withheld; surface it to the user, do not retry or fabricate the omitted content.

tools.name: set_active_version
tools.description: Pin a CONCRETE Odoo version (sentinels like 'auto' are rejected; the call doubles as a cheap reachability probe; 24h idle TTL). The pin is server-side state scoped to the API KEY - any concurrent agent or session sharing the key can overwrite it, so odoo_version='auto' may resolve to someone else's pin. Pass the concrete version on every subsequent call (multi-version flows like migrations and cross-version comparisons included); omitting odoo_version raises a validation error.

tools.name: set_active_profile
tools.description: Pin tenant profile for the session so subsequent calls scope to one customer profile.

tools.name: list_available_versions
tools.description: Enumerate which Odoo versions the server has indexed. Run before set_active_version when unsure what is available.

tools.name: list_available_profiles
tools.description: Enumerate which tenant profiles exist in the server index. Run before set_active_profile.

tools.name: resolve_stylesheet
tools.description: Enumerate CSS/SCSS/LESS stylesheets a module ships with selector/variable/mixin counts and the @import chain. LESS covers legacy v8-v11.

tools.name: find_style_override
tools.description: Find where a CSS selector or SCSS/LESS variable is first defined and which modules override it, with the full override chain. Covers CSS, SCSS, and LESS (LESS for the legacy pre-SCSS era, ~v8-v12).

tools.name: resolve_orm_chain
tools.description: Walk a dotted ORM field path hop by hop to the terminal field type or the exact hop where it breaks. Preferred over entity_lookup for multi-hop paths. Resolves inherited fields depth-first - a field on a nearer ancestor (e.g. a mixin) shadows a same-name field on a farther ancestor.

tools.name: validate_domain
tools.description: Validate search domain terms: field-path resolution and operator version-awareness. Operator validity is version-aware (parent_of v9+, any/not any v17+). Logical connectors are skipped.

tools.name: validate_depends
tools.description: Validate compute method's `@api.depends('a.b', ...)` paths; flag `id` and suggest typos. Catches stale compute declarations before runtime failure.

tools.name: validate_relation
tools.description: Assert a relational field points at the expected comodel (many2one/one2many/many2many). Reports the actual comodel on mismatch.

tools.name: find_test_examples
tools.description: Semantic search for Odoo test code examples (test_method, test_class, js_test chunks only - never returns production code). Use to discover existing tests before writing new ones to avoid reinventing already-covered cases.
tools.example_call: find_test_examples(query='unit test for sale order confirmation', odoo_version='17.0')

tools.name: tests_covering
tools.description: List test methods that have COVERS_MODEL/COVERS_FIELD/COVERS_METHOD edges to the target model or field (static reference coverage, not runtime executed coverage). Grouped by via type: assert / setup / body.

tools.name: test_class_inspect
tools.description: Inspect a TestClass or TestHelper by name: base chain (INHERITS_TEST), setUpClass cursor contract (test_type, commit_allowed), test methods with assert counts, and subclassed-by list. Does not return setUpClass fixture contents - Read the source for those. method discriminator: summary | hierarchy | methods | setup.

tools.name: test_base_classes
tools.description: Menu of official Odoo test framework base classes (TransactionCase, HttpCase, SavepointCase, Form, etc.) for the given version, with test_type and cursor contract. Always surfaces: cr.commit() FORBIDDEN - isolation is savepoint rollback.

tools.name: test_coverage_audit
tools.description: Audit an entire module for test coverage gaps: lists fields/methods with zero COVERS_* edges (never referenced by any test). Static reference coverage only, not runtime executed coverage. Limit 200 unreferenced fields.

tools.name: js_test_inspect
tools.description: List JsTestSuite nodes in a module: framework mix (hoot/qunit/tour), file paths, suite sizes, describe/test sample, mounts, tags. Filter by framework. v17 uses QUnit (*_tests.js), v18+ uses Hoot (*.test.js).

resources.description: Model record: inheritance chain, field count, defining modules.
resources.when_to_use: Already know the model name; want canonical record without a tool call.

resources.description: Field record: type, compute method, definition module, is_related.
resources.when_to_use: Already know model + field name; want record without a tool call.

resources.description: Method record: override chain, super_ratio, convention, source file.
resources.when_to_use: Already know model + method name; want override guidance without a tool call.

resources.description: View record: xpath chain, inherit_id, language, arch.
resources.when_to_use: Already know the view XML ID; want the canonical view definition without a tool call.

resources.description: Module record: manifest, defines/extends counts, license notice if restricted.
resources.when_to_use: Already know the module name; want manifest + summary without a tool call.

resources.description: Pattern catalogue entry: code snippet, gotchas, language, min version.
resources.when_to_use: Want to learn a curated pattern by name (wizard, multi-company, etc.).

resources.description: Stylesheet record: selectors, imports, variables, language (CSS/SCSS/LESS).
resources.when_to_use: Want canonical stylesheet definition without a tool call.

resources.description: Markdown tree describing a test class or helper: base chain, setUp fixtures, test methods, subclassed-by list. Equivalent to calling test_class_inspect with method='summary' for the given class.
resources.when_to_use: Already know module + class name; want a stable bookmarkable URI to re-fetch the test class tree without re-running discovery.

resources.description: Markdown tree listing test methods that reference a model (COVERS_* static reference edges, not runtime coverage). Same content as tests_covering(model=...).
resources.when_to_use: Already know the model name; want a stable bookmarkable URI to re-fetch test coverage without re-running the tool.
